mapper.select: select a.device_ioe_idx, a.site_id, a.device_id, a.device_name, a.upload_timestamp, a.upload_date, a.device_stat , site.site_name, b.device_grp_name from ( select device_ioe_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_reg_id, serial_no, inst_type, inst_purpose, data_period, data_cnt, ct_capacity, ct_capacity_list, pw_capacity, ch_cnt, ch_purpose, provider, vr_device_id, vr_device_grp_id, vr_owner_id, vr_action, vr_stat, vr_mod_date, vr_error, tm_voltage, tm_pulse, tm_ct_ratio, tm_pt_tatio, network_conf, options, create_timestamp, create_date, upload_timestamp, upload_date, device_stat, reg_date from tb_device_ioe where 1=1 and (device_id, reg_date) in ( select device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_ioe group by device_id ) ) a, tb_site site, ( select device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device_type, inst_type , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) b where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id and device_ioe_idx = #{deviceIoeIdx }

select a.device_pcs_idx, a.site_id, a.device_id, a.device_name, a.std_date, a.device_stat, a.alarm_msg, a.ac_voltage, a.ac_power, a.ac_current, a.ac_freq, a.ac_set_power, a.ac_pf, a.dc_voltage, a.dc_power, a.dc_current, a.dc_freq, a.dc_set_power, a.dc_pf, a.today_c_energy, today_d_energy , site.site_name, b.device_grp_name from ( select device_pcs_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, alarm_msg, ac_voltage, ac_power, ac_current, ac_freq, ac_set_power, ac_pf, dc_voltage, dc_power, dc_current, dc_freq, dc_set_power, dc_pf, std_date, reg_date , pcs_status, pcsStatus, remote_mode, pcs_command, today_d_energy, today_c_energy, total_d_energy, total_c_energe from tb_device_pcs where 1=1 and (device_id, reg_date) in ( select device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_pcs group by device_id ) ) a, tb_site site, ( select device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device_type, inst_type , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) b where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id and device_pcs_idx = #{devicePcsIdx }

select a.device_bms_idx, a.site_id, a.device_id, a.device_name, a.std_date, a.device_stat, a.sys_soc, a.curr_soc, a.sys_soh, a.sys_soh, a.sys_voltage, a.sys_current, a.dod , site.site_name, b.device_grp_name from ( select device_bms_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, sys_soc, curr_soc, sys_soh, sys_voltage, sys_current, dod, std_date, reg_date from tb_device_bms where 1=1 and (device_id, reg_date) in ( select device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_bms group by device_id ) ) a, tb_site site, ( select device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device_type, inst_type , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) b where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id and device_bms_idx = #{deviceBmsIdx }

select a.device_pv_idx, a.site_id, a.device_id, a.device_name, a.std_date, a.device_stat, a.alarm_msg, a.temp, a.tot_power , site.site_name, b.device_grp_name from ( select device_pv_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, alarm_msg, temp, tot_power, std_date, reg_date from tb_device_pv where 1=1 and (device_id, reg_date) in ( select device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_pv group by device_id ) ) a, tb_site site, ( select device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device_type, inst_type , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) b where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id and device_pv_idx = #{devicePvIdx }
select device_id, site_id, user_idx, device_name, device_grp_idx, device_type, inst_type, del_yn, reg_uid, reg_date, mod_uid, mod_date from tb_device where device_id = #{deviceId}
